meta.label: DSS Connection Helper
meta.description: Helper macros for working with DSS connections
meta.author: Stephen.Mazzei@dataiku.com

params.name: dss_host
params.label: DSS host
params.description: Base URL of the DSS instance used by the admin API client (e.g. http://localhost:10000)

params.name: api_key
params.label: Admin API key
params.description: Admin-level API key used to compute Snowflake metadata
